title: meibomia rigida
intro: Meibomia rigida, also known as stiff meadow-beauty, is a perennial wildflower native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has been shown to provide various health benefits, including relief from fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. Meibomia rigida can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional folk remedies.
